killMS.kMS.GiveNoise(options, DicoSelectOptions, IdSharedMem, SM, PM, PM2, ConfigJacobianAntenna, GD)[source]¶

Used to initialise KAFCA. TODO document better.

killMS.kMS.driver()[source]¶
killMS.kMS.main(OP=None, MSName=None)[source]¶

Docstring for main

Parameters:

  • OP – OptParse object describing killMS options.

  • MSName – Data file name to work on.

killMS.kMS.read_options()[source]¶

This function reads the already-initialised default parset object. It then redefines all options as part of an optparse call. After this, it reads the command-line inputs for all options; defaults are kept when not provided via commandline. Finally, it calls on killMS.Other.MyPickle to save the actual parset call for this run. It returns the optparse object for this run.

defines a new MyOptParse object. depends on ReadCFG, ClassPrint, Other.ModColor, Other.logo

Return type:

<module ‘killMS.Parset.MyOptParse’ from ‘/home/bonnassieux/Wirtinger/killMS/killMS/Parset/MyOptParse.py’>
